tools.name: install_skill
tools.description: Create or replace a skill in Demido's own skills folder

tools.name: delete_skill
tools.description: Delete a skill folder (always asks first)

tools.name: skill_spec
tools.description: Get the Demido Studio skill authoring spec: skill.json, tools.json, SKILL.md, commands, params, install rules. Use before writing or editing any skill, and when asked how skills work.
